reviews.review_msg: The sonnets that he interpreted at the beginning of the term were really interesting. After that, it was all free verse poems, like TOO FREE to the point where random words were placed together and contained absolutely no meaning. I was thinking "Even I could write stuff like this and get it published." TAs often sexually interpreted poems.

This guy is awesome.  For a lecturer fairly new to the university, he is a hidden jem.  He knows his stuff VERY well and is absolutely hilarious.  He cares about his students, and will always take time to chat, help out, or for a coffee.  You can easily tell he is generally a good person at heart and has excellent teaching ability.
